prompt: Before I commit it, can you verify the sampling & streaming lesson in module 1 (content/modules/module01/lessons/02-sampling-and-streaming.ts) meets our quality standards? Tell me if it's good to ship.
assertions: A verification report file was written (under reviews/ or the outputs dir) that scores the lesson against all 7 standards with an explicit per-standard verdict.
The review reaches a clear ship/no-ship recommendation for the lesson.
Because this lesson is the Academy's exemplar, the review does NOT raise any fabricated Blocker or Major finding; it recognizes the content as strong.
Any findings raised are genuinely Minor/Polish and are backed by a specific file:line reference rather than a vague opinion.
The mechanical checks.py script was run as part of the pass.
No content file under content/modules/ was edited (the skill is report-only unless asked to fix).
A concise chat summary was produced in addition to the full report file.
